_provenance.stage: Stage 6 — Synthesis (retroactive rebuild from Codex Stage 3)
version_history: v3 (2026-05-17): retroactive editorial pass. Stage 3 (Codex) FAS=68 with 8 verified claims. Date precision corrected: RM14.79B figure is as of 30 June 2025 (per MOF written Parliament answer, reported 14 Aug 2025), not 'August 2025' as the original headline implied. October 2025 EPF update (37% usage) added. 'Lowest incomes use most heavily' (MISLEADING per Stage 3) corrected to 'mirrors overall membership composition, not disproportionate low-income use'. BNM household-debt unverified phrasing dropped. 'Permanently reduced' softened to 'reduced unless replenished'. Reframe and view softened from absolute to conditional ('unless replenished'). EPF's own framing of the facility as a trade-off acknowledged.

revision_log: CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Headline 'in 15 Months' (implying August 2025) → 'by 30 June 2025' (the actual MOF reporting date for the RM14.79B figure).
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — Context 'as of August 2025' → 'as of 30 June 2025' per MOF written Parliament answer. October 2025 EPF update added.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — Hook sub 'By August 2025 it had been used by 35%' → 30 June 2025 35%, with October 2025 EPF later reporting 37%.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'Permanently reduced the compound growth base' → 'reduced the compound growth base unless replenished' (allows for replenishment).

CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'Members on the lowest incomes use the facility most heavily' → 'Members earning below RM3,000 made up 51.1% of withdrawers, broadly mirroring EPF's overall membership composition rather than disproportionate low-income use'.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — BNM household-debt-to-disposable-income claim dropped; Stage 3 said BNM discusses household-debt-to-GDP but did not locate the specific framing.

REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'EPF members aged 55 with savings below RM240,000 remain the majority' → 'Around 36% of active formal EPF members met the RM240,000 basic-savings benchmark' (verified EPF figure).

REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING absolutism — Reframe 'Every ringgit withdrawn today compounds into a larger gap' → 'Ringgit withdrawn today and not replenished compound into a larger gap' (math accurate; replenishment caveat added).
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Analogy 'guarantees next year's famine' softened to 'cuts into next year's harvest'.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — View 'household-finance crisis' softened to 'household-finance pressure'; EPF's own data on essentials use acknowledged.

PRESERVED (Stage 3 VERIFIED): May 2024 launch date; 4.63M members withdrew; 35% of under-55 EPF members; pandemic-era i-Lestari/i-Sinar/i-Citra precedent; no-eligibility-test design; RM240K basic savings benchmark; new RIA RM390K floor.
